历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3904 → 5049 → 4919 → 7633 → 5633, showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall. In 2024, it dropped significantly to 7633, and rebounded to 5633 in 2025, with large fluctuations in the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is about 5633. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 112 in 2021, 119 in 2022, 113 in 2023, 121 in 2024, and 136 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion each year. The 2026 plan is 138, an increase of 2 from 2025, an expansion rate of about 1.5%, which has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 29th, consistently in the Top 30 in recent years, making it a top-tier comprehensive normal university in China. Its Douyin popularity ranks 28th overall, rated as 'relatively hot', with high short video exposure. In the 2026 reputation cycle, there were no obvious negative public opinions or abnormal admission records, and the overall image of the school is positive and stable. It has 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Education, Statistics, and Physical Education, A in Software Engineering, Psychology, Mathematics, and Chinese Language and Literature, demonstrating strong academic strength and strong appeal to high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly popular and recommended, matching the university's advantageous disciplines like Statistics, Software Engineering, and Psychology. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Jiangsu Province is about 521,000, a significant increase of about 46% compared to 2025 (about 358,000). The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 380,000, indicating significantly intensified competition, with an upward trend year by year, reflecting increased overall competition intensity. East China Normal University is located in Shanghai, not a local university in Jiangsu Province. Its enrollment proportion in Jiangsu Province accounts for about 5%–7% of total enrollment, making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preference advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5633, the small expansion of 1.5% in the 2026 plan, the significant increase of about 46% in the total number of candidates in Jiangsu Province leading to intensified competition, the high level and positive reputation of the university, and the alignment of advantageous disciplines with popular majors, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking for Physics Category will slightly decline compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5713, with a range of 5213–6213.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is about 5713, with a range of 5213–6213. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (5213) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Statistics Dual Degree, Psychology Dual Degree, Software Engineering, etc.). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (5500–6000) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Communication, etc.), while also considering sprinting for Tier 1. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (6213) are advised to mainly rely on Tier 3 as a safety net, while also paying attention to Tier 2 majors with relatively lower ranking requirements.
